action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Tusler, Piwowarczyk, Bare, Andraca, Behnke, Callahan, Clancy, DeSmidt, Dittrich, Donovan, Fitzgerald, Joers, Knodl, Maxey, Miresse, Novak, O'Connor, Ortiz-Velez, Palmeri, Roe, Steffen, Kitchens and Melotik; 
cosponsored by Senators Cabral-Guevara, Habush Sinykin, Jacque, Roys and Larson
